creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Leo Vandewoestijne from comment #3)

Did try latest patch with poudriere on a 13.2 jail and found build failure with CTRL=on and all other options OFF, It sugests that maybe CTRL option might have dependency on other option:
---
In file included from database-service-zone-load.c:93:
./database-service-zone-resignature.h:83:2: error: "no RRSIG management support: database-service-zone-resignature.h should not be included"
#error "no RRSIG management support: database-service-zone-resignature.h should not be included"
---

PlIST issue remains when CTRL=on and rest default options:
---
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: bin/%%USERS%%
---

Are you running `poudriere testport -c -j JAIL -p PORTS dns/yadifa`?
                                 ----^
